# 12. src/components/layout/MobileMenu.jsx
@"
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

export default function MobileMenu({ isOpen, onClose }) {
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
    } else {
      document.body.style.overflow = 'unset'
    }
    return () => { document.body.style.overflow = 'unset' }
  }, [isOpen])

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-dark/95 text-light flex flex-col">
      <div className="flex justify-end p-4">
        <button onClick={onClose} className="text-2xl">&times;</button>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center flex-1 space-y-6 text-xl">
        <Link to="/shop" onClick={onClose}>Shop</Link>
        <Link to="/build-your-own" onClick={onClose}>Build Your Box</Link>
        <Link to="/contact" onClick={onClose}>Contact</Link>
        <Link to="/account" onClick={onClose}>Account</Link>
        <Link to="/faq" onClick={onClose}>FAQ</Link>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\layout\MobileMenu.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 14. src/components/shared/NewsletterSignup.jsx
@"
import { useState } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function NewsletterSignup() {
  const [email, setEmail] = useState('')
  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle') // idle, loading, success, error

  const handleSubmit = async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    setStatus('loading')
    try {
      await axios.post(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/newsletter/subscribe`, { email })
      setStatus('success')
      setEmail('')
    } catch {
      setStatus('error')
    }
  }

  return (
    <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="flex flex-col space-y-2">
      <input
        type="email"
        placeholder="Your email"
        value={email}
        onChange={(e) => setEmail(e.target.value)}
        required
        className="px-3 py-2 bg-gray-800 text-light rounded border border-gray-700 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary"
      />
      <button
        type="submit"
        disabled={status === 'loading'}
        className="bg-primary text-dark py-2 rounded hover:bg-primary/80 transition disabled:opacity-50"
      >
        {status === 'loading' ? 'Submitting...' : 'Subscribe'}
      </button>
      {status === 'success' && <p className="text-green-500 text-sm">Subscribed!</p>}
      {status === 'error' && <p className="text-red-500 text-sm">Something went wrong.</p>}
    </form>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\shared\NewsletterSignup.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 15. src/components/shared/Button.jsx
@"
import clsx from 'clsx'

export default function Button({ children, variant = 'primary', className, ...props }) {
  const base = 'px-4 py-2 rounded font-medium transition disabled:opacity-50'
  const variants = {
    primary: 'bg-primary text-dark hover:bg-primary/80',
    ghost: 'border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10',
    danger: 'bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700',
  }
  return (
    <button className={clsx(base, variants[variant], className)} {...props}>
      {children}
    </button>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\shared\Button.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 16. src/context/CartContext.jsx
@"
import { createContext, useContext, useEffect } from 'react'
import { create } from 'zustand'
import { persist } from 'zustand/middleware'

export const useCart = create(
  persist(
    (set, get) => ({
      items: [],
      isOpen: false,
      totalItems: 0,
      subtotal: 0,
      addItem: (product, variant, quantity) => {
        const items = get().items
        const existing = items.find(item => item.variantId === variant.id)
        if (existing) {
          set({
            items: items.map(item =>
              item.variantId === variant.id
                ? { ...item, quantity: item.quantity + quantity }
                : item
            )
          })
        } else {
          set({
            items: [
              ...items,
              {
                productId: product.id,
                variantId: variant.id,
                name: product.name,
                variantLabel: variant.label,
                price: variant.price,
                quantity,
                image: product.images?.[0]?.url || '/placeholder-product.webp',
              }
            ]
          })
        }
        get().recalculate()
      },
      removeItem: (variantId) => {
        set({ items: get().items.filter(item => item.variantId !== variantId) })
        get().recalculate()
      },
      updateQuantity: (variantId, quantity) => {
        set({
          items: get().items.map(item =>
            item.variantId === variantId ? { ...item, quantity } : item
          )
        })
        get().recalculate()
      },
      clearCart: () => set({ items: [] }),
      openDrawer: () => set({ isOpen: true }),
      closeDrawer: () => set({ isOpen: false }),
      recalculate: () => {
        const items = get().items
        const totalItems = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0)
        const subtotal = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.price * item.quantity, 0)
        set({ totalItems, subtotal })
      },
    }),
    { name: 'cart-storage' }
  )
)

const CartContext = createContext(null)
export const CartProvider = ({ children }) => {
  useEffect(() => {
    useCart.getState().recalculate()
  }, [])
  return <CartContext.Provider value={null}>{children}</CartContext.Provider>
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\context\CartContext.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 17. src/components/cart/CartDrawer.jsx
@"
import { useCart } from '../../context/CartContext'
import CartLineItem from './CartLineItem'
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'

export default function CartDrawer() {
  const { isOpen, closeDrawer, items, subtotal } = useCart()

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/50" onClick={closeDrawer}>
      <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full w-full max-w-md bg-light text-dark shadow-xl" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 border-b">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Your Cart</h2>
          <button onClick={closeDrawer} className="text-2xl">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 overflow-y-auto" style={{ maxHeight: 'calc(100vh - 200px)' }}>
          {items.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-center text-gray-500">Your cart is empty</p>
          ) : (
            items.map(item => <CartLineItem key={item.variantId} item={item} />)
          )}
        </div>
        {items.length > 0 && (
          <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 border-t bg-light">
            <div className="flex justify-between mb-4">
              <span className="font-bold">Subtotal</span>
              <span>UGX {subtotal.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </div>
            <Link to="/checkout" onClick={closeDrawer}>
              <button className="w-full bg-primary text-dark py-3 rounded font-bold hover:bg-primary/80">
                Checkout
              </button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\cart\CartDrawer.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 18. src/components/cart/CartLineItem.jsx
@"
import { useCart } from '../../context/CartContext'

export default function CartLineItem({ item }) {
  const { updateQuantity, removeItem } = useCart()

  return (
    <div className="flex py-4 border-b">
      <img src={item.image} alt={item.name} className="w-16 h-16 object-cover rounded" />
      <div className="ml-4 flex-1">
        <h4 className="font-bold">{item.name}</h4>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{item.variantLabel}</p>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
          <div className="flex items-center border rounded">
            <button onClick={() => updateQuantity(item.variantId, item.quantity - 1)} className="px-2 py-1">-</button>
            <span className="px-3">{item.quantity}</span>
            <button onClick={() => updateQuantity(item.variantId, item.quantity + 1)} className="px-2 py-1">+</button>
          </div>
          <span>UGX {(item.price * item.quantity).toLocaleString()}</span>
        </div>
        <button onClick={() => removeItem(item.variantId)} className="text-sm text-red-500 mt-1">Remove</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\cart\CartLineItem.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 19. src/components/product/ProductCard.jsx
@"
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useCart } from '../../context/CartContext'
import { useState } from 'react'

export default function ProductCard({ product }) {
  const [image, setImage] = useState(product.images?.[0]?.url || '/placeholder-product.webp')
  const { addItem } = useCart()
  const variant = product.variants?.[0] // default first variant

  const handleAdd = (e) => {
    e.preventDefault()
    if (variant) {
      addItem(product, variant, 1)
    }
  }

  return (
    <Link to={`/products/${product.slug}`} className="block group">
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-md overflow-hidden hover:shadow-xl transition">
        <div className="relative pb-[100%] bg-gray-200">
          <img
            src={image}
            alt={product.name}
            className="absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover group-hover:scale-105 transition duration-300"
            loading="lazy"
            onError={() => setImage('/placeholder-product.webp')}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="p-4">
          <h3 className="font-bold text-lg mb-1">{product.name}</h3>
          <p className="text-primary font-semibold mb-3">UGX {product.base_price.toLocaleString()}</p>
          <button
            onClick={handleAdd}
            className="w-full bg-primary text-dark py-2 rounded font-medium hover:bg-primary/80 transition"
          >
            Add to Cart
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </Link>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\product\ProductCard.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 23. src/components/home/FeaturedCollections.jsx
@"
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import ProductCard from '../product/ProductCard'
import ProductCardSkeleton from '../product/ProductCardSkeleton'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function FeaturedCollections() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)

  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products/featured`)
      .then(res => setProducts(res.data))
      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
  }, [])

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-light">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">

            : products.map(p => "<ProductCard key={p.id} product={p} />")
          }
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  )
}

# 25. src/components/home/CoreCollectionCarousel.jsx
@"
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import ProductCard from '../product/ProductCard'
import ProductCardSkeleton from '../product/ProductCardSkeleton'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function CoreCollectionCarousel() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const scrollRef = useRef()

  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products?limit=12`)
      .then(res => setProducts(res.data.products))
      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
  }, [])

  const scroll = (dir) => {
    if (scrollRef.current) {
      const { scrollLeft, clientWidth } = scrollRef.current
      const to = dir === 'left' ? scrollLeft - clientWidth * 0.8 : scrollLeft + clientWidth * 0.8
      scrollRef.current.scrollTo({ left: to, behavior: 'smooth' })
    }
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-light">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-8">Core Collection</h2>
        <div className="relative">
          <button onClick={() => scroll('left')} className="absolute left-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10 bg-dark/50 text-light p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-dark/70">←</button>
          <div ref={scrollRef} className="overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide flex space-x-6 pb-4" style={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none' }}>
            {loading
              ? @( for ($i=0; $i -lt 6; $i++) { "<div className='flex-none w-64'><ProductCardSkeleton /></div>" } )
              : products.map(p => "<div key={p.id} className='flex-none w-64'><ProductCard product={p} /></div>")
            }
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => scroll('right')} className="absolute right-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10 bg-dark/50 text-light p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-dark/70">→</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\home\CoreCollectionCarousel.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 27. src/pages/ShopPage.jsx
@"
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'
import ProductCard from '../components/product/ProductCard'
import ProductCardSkeleton from '../components/product/ProductCardSkeleton'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function ShopPage() {
  const { category } = useParams()
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1)
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true)

  useEffect(() => {
    setLoading(true)
    const params = new URLSearchParams({ page, limit: 12 })
    if (category) params.append('category', category)
    axios.get(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products?${params}`)
      .then(res => {
        setProducts(prev => page === 1 ? res.data.products : [...prev, ...res.data.products])
        setHasMore(res.data.products.length === 12)
      })
      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
  }, [page, category])

  const loadMore = () => setPage(p => p + 1)

  return (
    <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-8">Shop {category ? `- ${category}` : ''}</h1>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6">
        {products.map(p => "<ProductCard key={p.id} product={p} />")}
        {loading && @( for ($i=0; $i -lt 8; $i++) { "<ProductCardSkeleton />" } )}
      </div>
      {hasMore && !loading && (
        <div className="text-center mt-8">
          <button onClick={loadMore} className="bg-primary text-dark px-6 py-2 rounded font-medium hover:bg-primary/80">
            Load More
          </button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\pages\ShopPage.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 28. src/pages/ProductDetailPage.jsx
@"
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'
import axios from 'axios'
import { useCart } from '../context/CartContext'
import ProductImageCarousel from '../components/product/ProductImageCarousel'
import SizeSelector from '../components/product/SizeSelector'
import QuantityPicker from '../components/product/QuantityPicker'
import AddToCartButton from '../components/product/AddToCartButton'
import ItemListAccordion from '../components/product/ItemListAccordion'
import RelatedProducts from '../components/product/RelatedProducts'

export default function ProductDetailPage() {
  const { slug } = useParams()
  const [product, setProduct] = useState(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [selectedVariant, setSelectedVariant] = useState(null)
  const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1)
  const { addItem } = useCart()

  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products/${slug}`)
      .then(res => {
        setProduct(res.data)
        setSelectedVariant(res.data.variants?.[0])
      })
      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
  }, [slug])

  const handleAddToCart = () => {
    if (product && selectedVariant) {
      addItem(product, selectedVariant, quantity)
    }
  }

  if (loading) return <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">Loading...</div>
  if (!product) return <div>Product not found</div>

  return (
    <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-8">
      <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-8">
        <ProductImageCarousel images={product.images} />
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold mb-2">{product.name}</h1>
          {product.subtitle && <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">{product.subtitle}</p>}
          <p className="text-2xl text-primary font-bold mb-4">UGX {selectedVariant?.price.toLocaleString()}</p>
          <SizeSelector variants={product.variants} selected={selectedVariant} onChange={setSelectedVariant} />
          <QuantityPicker quantity={quantity} onChange={setQuantity} />
          <AddToCartButton onClick={handleAddToCart} />
          <ItemListAccordion items={product.items} />
        </div>
      </div>
      <RelatedProducts categoryId={product.category_id} currentId={product.id} />
    </div>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\pages\ProductDetailPage.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

import { useState } from 'react'

export default function ProductImageCarousel({ images }) {
  const [mainImage, setMainImage] = useState(images?.[0]?.url || '/placeholder-product.webp')

  if (!images || images.length === 0) {
    return <img src="/placeholder-product.webp" alt="Product" className="w-full rounded-lg" />
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <img src={mainImage} alt="Product" className="w-full rounded-lg mb-4" />
      <div className="flex space-x-2 overflow-x-auto">
        {images.map((img, idx) => (
          <button key={idx} onClick={() => setMainImage(img.url)} className="flex-none w-20 h-20 border-2 rounded overflow-hidden hover:border-primary">
            <img src={img.url} alt={img.alt_text} className="w-full h-full object-cover" />
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function QuantityPicker({ quantity, onChange }) {

    <div className="mb-4">
      <label className="block font-medium mb-2">Quantity</label>
      <div className="flex items-center border rounded w-fit">
        <button onClick={() => onChange(quantity - 1)} disabled={quantity <= 1} className="px-3 py-1 border-r">-</button>
        <span className="px-4 py-1">{quantity}</span>
        <button onClick={() => onChange(quantity + 1)} className="px-3 py-1 border-l">+</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

# 33. src/components/product/ItemListAccordion.jsx

import { useState } from 'react'

export default function ItemListAccordion({ items }) {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false)

  if (!items || items.length === 0) return null

  return (
    <div className="border rounded mb-4">
      <button onClick={() => setOpen(!open)} className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 font-medium flex justify-between items-center">
        What's in the box
        <span>{open ? '−' : '+'}</span>
      </button>
      {open && (
        <ul className="px-4 pb-3 list-disc list-inside">
          {items.map((item, idx) => <li key={idx}>{item.label}</li>)}
        </ul>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\components\product\ItemListAccordion.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# 34. src/components/product/RelatedProducts.jsx
@"
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import axios from 'axios'
import ProductCard from './ProductCard'

export default function RelatedProducts({ categoryId, currentId }) {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([])

  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products?category=${categoryId}&limit=3`)
      .then(res => setProducts(res.data.products.filter(p => p.id !== currentId)))
  }, [categoryId, currentId])

  if (products.length === 0) return null

  return (
    <div className="mt-12">
      <h3 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-6">You might also like</h3>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
        {products.map(p => "<ProductCard key={p.id} product={p} />")}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

# 37. src/services/api.js
@"
import axios from 'axios'

const api = axios.create({
  baseURL: import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL,
  withCredentials: true,
})

api.interceptors.request.use(config => {
  const token = localStorage.getItem('accessToken')
  if (token) {
    config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
  }
  return config
})

api.interceptors.response.use(
  response => response,
  async error => {
    const originalRequest = error.config
    if (error.response?.status === 401 && !originalRequest._retry) {
      originalRequest._retry = true
      try {
        const { data } = await axios.post(`${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/auth/refresh`, {}, { withCredentials: true })
        localStorage.setItem('accessToken', data.accessToken)
        originalRequest.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${data.accessToken}`
        return api(originalRequest)
      } catch (refreshError) {
        localStorage.removeItem('accessToken')
        window.location.href = '/account'
        return Promise.reject(refreshError)
      }
    }
    return Promise.reject(error)
  }
)

export default api
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\services\api.js" -Encoding UTF8

# 38. src/context/AuthContext.jsx (minimal)
@"
import { createContext, useContext, useState } from 'react'

const AuthContext = createContext(null)

export const AuthProvider = ({ children }) => {
  const [user, setUser] = useState(null)

  const login = (userData) => setUser(userData)
  const logout = () => setUser(null)

  return (
    <AuthContext.Provider value={{ user, login, logout }}>
      {children}
    </AuthContext.Provider>
  )
}

export const useAuth = () => useContext(AuthContext)
"@ | Set-Content -Path "$frontend\src\context\AuthContext.jsx" -Encoding UTF8

# HAIQ Project Scaffold Creator
# Run from PowerShell as: .\scaffold-haiq.ps1

$root = "D:\Junior Reactive Projects\HAIQ"

$dirs = @(
  # Root
  "$root",
  # Frontend
  "$root\frontend\public",
  "$root\frontend\src\assets\images",
  "$root\frontend\src\assets\fonts",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\layout",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\home",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\product",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\cart",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\checkout",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\tracking",
  "$root\frontend\src\components\shared",
  "$root\frontend\src\pages",
  "$root\frontend\src\hooks",
  "$root\frontend\src\context",
  "$root\frontend\src\services",
  "$root\frontend\src\store",
  "$root\frontend\src\utils",
  # Backend
  "$root\backend\src\config",
  "$root\backend\src\middleware",
  "$root\backend\src\routes\admin",
  "$root\backend\src\controllers\admin",
  "$root\backend\src\services",
  "$root\backend\src\db\migrations",
  "$root\backend\src\db\queries",
  "$root\backend\src\utils",
  # Admin
  "$root\admin\src\components\layout",
  "$root\admin\src\components\orders",
  "$root\admin\src\components\products",
  "$root\admin\src\components\messages",
  "$root\admin\src\components\analytics",
  "$root\admin\src\components\shared",
  "$root\admin\src\pages",
  "$root\admin\src\hooks",
  "$root\admin\src\services",
  # GitHub Actions
  "$root\.github\workflows"
)

foreach ($d in $dirs) {
  New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $d | Out-Null
}

# Create placeholder files
$files = @(
  "$root\.gitignore",
  "$root\.env.example",
  "$root\README.md",
  "$root\SPEC.md",
  "$root\frontend\.env.example",
  "$root\frontend\index.html",
  "$root\frontend\vite.config.js",
  "$root\frontend\tailwind.config.js",
  "$root\frontend\postcss.config.js",

)

foreach ($f in $files) {
  if (-not (Test-Path $f)) {

FILE: backend\src\controllers\auth.controller.js

const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const bcrypt = require('bcrypt');
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const { generateToken } = require('../utils/crypto');
const { generateGuestToken } = require('../utils/tokenGenerator');
const { sendEmail } = require('../services/email.service');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const register = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { email, password, first_name, last_name, phone } = req.body;
    // Check if user exists
    const existing = await pool.query('SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ', [email]);
    if (existing.rows.length) {
      return res.status(409).json({ error: 'Email already registered' });
    }
    const hashed = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);
    const result = await pool.query(
      INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, first_name, last_name, phone, is_guest)
       VALUES (, , , , , false) RETURNING id, email, first_name, last_name,
      [email, hashed, first_name, last_name, phone]
    );
    const user = result.rows[0];
    // Generate email verification token and send email (simplified)
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '1d' });
    // In production, send actual email
    logger.info(Verification token for : );
    res.status(201).json({ message: 'Registration successful. Please check email to verify.', user });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Register error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

const login = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { email, password } = req.body;
    const result = await pool.query('SELECT id, email, password_hash, is_guest FROM users WHERE email = ', [email]);
    if (!result.rows.length) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });
    }
    const user = result.rows[0];
    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, user.password_hash);
    if (!valid) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });
    }
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: user.id, email: user.email }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '15m' });
    const refreshToken = jwt.sign({ id: user.id }, process.env.REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET, { expiresIn: '7d' });
    // Set refresh token as httpOnly cookie
    res.cookie('refreshToken', refreshToken, { httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'strict', maxAge: 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 });
    res.json({ accessToken: token, user: { id: user.id, email: user.email } });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Login error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

const logout = (req, res) => {
  res.clearCookie('refreshToken');
  res.json({ message: 'Logged out' });
};

const refresh = async (req, res) => {
  const token = req.cookies.refreshToken;
  if (!token) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'No refresh token' });
  try {
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET);
    const user = await pool.query('SELECT id, email FROM users WHERE id = ', [decoded.id]);
    if (!user.rows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'User not found' });
    const newAccessToken = jwt.sign({ id: user.rows[0].id, email: user.rows[0].email }, process.env.JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '15m' });
    res.json({ accessToken: newAccessToken });
  } catch (err) {
    return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid refresh token' });
  }
};

const forgotPassword = async (req, res) => {
  // Implementation placeholder
  res.json({ message: 'If email exists, reset link sent' });
};

const resetPassword = async (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Password reset' });
};

const verifyEmail = async (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Email verified' });
};

const linkGuestOrder = async (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Guest order linked' });
};

module.exports = { register, login, logout, refresh, forgotPassword, resetPassword, verifyEmail, linkGuestOrder };

FILE: backend\src\controllers\messages.controller.js

const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const sendMessage = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { order_id, body } = req.body;
    const userId = req.user.id;
    // Ensure order belongs to user (or guest)
    const orderCheck = await pool.query('SELECT id FROM orders WHERE id =  AND (user_id =  OR email = )', [order_id, userId, req.user.email]);
    if (!orderCheck.rows.length) return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Not your order' });
    const result = await pool.query(
      INSERT INTO messages (order_id, sender_type, sender_id, body) VALUES (, 'customer', , ) RETURNING id, created_at,
      [order_id, userId, body]
    );
    res.status(201).json({ message_id: result.rows[0].id, created_at: result.rows[0].created_at });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Send message error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
  }
};

const getThread = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { order_id } = req.params;
    const userId = req.user.id;
    const orderCheck = await pool.query('SELECT id FROM orders WHERE id =  AND (user_id =  OR email = )', [order_id, userId, req.user.email]);
    if (!orderCheck.rows.length) return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Not your order' });
    const messages = await pool.query(
      SELECT id, sender_type, body, is_read, created_at FROM messages WHERE order_id =  ORDER BY created_at ASC,
      [order_id]
    );
    res.json(messages.rows);
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Get thread error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
  }
};

module.exports = { sendMessage, getThread };

const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const subscribe = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { email } = req.body;
    await pool.query(
      INSERT INTO newsletter_subscribers (email) VALUES () ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET subscribed = true,
      [email]
    );
    res.json({ message: 'Subscribed successfully' });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Newsletter subscribe error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
  }
};

const unsubscribe = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { email } = req.body;
    await pool.query(UPDATE newsletter_subscribers SET subscribed = false WHERE email = , [email]);
    res.json({ message: 'Unsubscribed' });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Newsletter unsubscribe error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
  }
};

module.exports = { subscribe, unsubscribe };

FILE: backend\src\controllers\orders.controller.js
================================================================================
const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const { generateOrderNumber, generateTrackingToken } = require('../utils/tokenGenerator');
const { sendOrderConfirmation } = require('../services/email.service');
const logger = require('../config/logger');
const constants = require('../config/constants');

const create = async (req, res) => {
  const client = await pool.connect();
  try {
    await client.query('BEGIN');
    const {
      first_name, last_name, email, phone, delivery_address, delivery_note, gift_note,
      items, payment_method
    } = req.body;
    // Calculate subtotal and total (simplified: assume each item price fetched)
    let subtotal = 0;
    for (const item of items) {
      const variantRes = await client.query('SELECT price FROM product_variants WHERE id = ', [item.variant_id]);
      if (!variantRes.rows.length) throw new Error('Variant not found');
      subtotal += variantRes.rows[0].price * item.quantity;
    }
    const delivery_fee = 0; // implement logic later
    const total = subtotal + delivery_fee;
    const orderNumber = generateOrderNumber();
    const trackingToken = generateTrackingToken();
    // Create order
    const orderRes = await client.query(
      INSERT INTO orders (order_number, tracking_token, first_name, last_name, email, phone, delivery_address, delivery_note, gift_note, subtotal, delivery_fee, total, payment_method, status)
       VALUES (, , , , , , , , , , , , , ) RETURNING id, order_number, tracking_token, total,
      [orderNumber, trackingToken, first_name, last_name, email, phone, delivery_address, delivery_note, gift_note, subtotal, delivery_fee, total, payment_method, constants.ORDER_STATUS.PENDING]
    );
    const order = orderRes.rows[0];
    // Insert order items
    for (const item of items) {
      const variantRes = await client.query('SELECT product_id, label, price FROM product_variants WHERE id = ', [item.variant_id]);
      const variant = variantRes.rows[0];
      const productRes = await client.query('SELECT name FROM products WHERE id = ', [variant.product_id]);
      const productName = productRes.rows[0].name;
      const lineTotal = variant.price * item.quantity;
      await client.query(
        INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, variant_id, product_name, variant_label, unit_price, quantity, line_total)
         VALUES (, , , , , , , ),
        [order.id, variant.product_id, item.variant_id, productName, variant.label, variant.price, item.quantity, lineTotal]
      );
    }
    await client.query('COMMIT');
    // Send email (async, don't await)
    sendOrderConfirmation(order, email).catch(err => logger.error('Order confirmation email failed', err));
    res.status(201).json({
      order_id: order.id,
      order_number: order.order_number,
      tracking_token: order.tracking_token,
      total: order.total,
      payment_intent: {
        type: payment_method,
        internal_ref: order.id // simplified; real payment ref would be created separately
      }
    });
  } catch (err) {
    await client.query('ROLLBACK');
    logger.error('Order creation error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  } finally {
    client.release();
  }
};

const track = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { token } = req.params;
    const orderRes = await pool.query(
      SELECT id, order_number, status, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE tracking_token = ,
      [token]
    );
    if (!orderRes.rows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Order not found' });
    const order = orderRes.rows[0];
    // Build timeline based on status
    const timeline = [
      { status: 'pending', label: 'Order Received', timestamp: order.created_at, done: true },
      { status: 'freshly_kneaded', label: 'Freshly Kneaded', timestamp: null, done: order.status !== 'pending' },
      { status: 'ovenbound', label: 'Ovenbound 🔥', timestamp: null, done: ['ovenbound','on_the_cart','en_route','delivered'].includes(order.status) },
      { status: 'on_the_cart', label: 'On The Cart 🛒', timestamp: null, done: ['on_the_cart','en_route','delivered'].includes(order.status) },
      { status: 'en_route', label: 'En Route 🚴', timestamp: null, done: ['en_route','delivered'].includes(order.status) },
      { status: 'delivered', label: 'Delivered Delight 🎉', timestamp: null, done: order.status === 'delivered' }
    ];
    res.json({
      order_number: order.order_number,
      status: order.status,
      timeline
    });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Track order error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

const getUserOrders = async (req, res) => {
  // Implement: fetch orders for authenticated user
  res.json({ message: 'User orders endpoint' });
};

const getById = async (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Order detail' });
};

module.exports = { create, track, getUserOrders, getById };

const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const { withIdempotency } = require('../utils/idempotency');
const { verifySignature } = require('../utils/crypto');
const mtnService = require('../services/mtn.service');
const airtelService = require('../services/airtel.service');
const logger = require('../config/logger');
const constants = require('../config/constants');

const initiateMtn = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { order_id, phone } = req.body;
    const orderRes = await pool.query('SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = ', [order_id]);
    if (!orderRes.rows.length) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Order not found' });
    const amount = orderRes.rows[0].total;
    const internalRef = mtn__;
    // Store payment record
    await pool.query(
      INSERT INTO payments (order_id, payment_method, internal_ref, amount, status)
       VALUES (, , , , ),
      [order_id, constants.PAYMENT_METHOD.MTN_MOMO, internalRef, amount, constants.PAYMENT_STATUS.INITIATED]
    );
    // Call MTN service (stub)
    const result = await mtnService.requestToPay({ amount, phone, externalId: internalRef });
    res.json({ internal_ref: internalRef, status: 'initiated', provider_response: result });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('MTN initiate error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Payment initiation failed' });
  }
};

const mtnStatus = async (req, res) => {
  const { ref } = req.params;
  // query payment table and/or MTN API
  res.json({ status: 'pending' });
};

const mtnWebhook = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const signature = req.headers['x-callback-signature'];
    const rawBody = JSON.stringify(req.body);
    // Verify signature with secret
    const secret = process.env.MTN_MOMO_CALLBACK_SECRET;
    if (!verifySignature(req.body, signature, secret)) {
      logger.warn('Invalid MTN webhook signature');
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid signature' });
    }
    const { externalId, amount, status } = req.body;
    // Use idempotency
    await withIdempotency(externalId, async () => {
      // Update payment and order
      await pool.query(
        UPDATE payments SET status = , provider_ref = , webhook_payload = , signature_valid = true WHERE internal_ref = ,
        [status === 'SUCCESSFUL' ? constants.PAYMENT_STATUS.SUCCESSFUL : constants.PAYMENT_STATUS.FAILED, req.body.transactionId, req.body, externalId]
      );
      if (status === 'SUCCESSFUL') {
        await pool.query(
          UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'paid', status =  WHERE id = (SELECT order_id FROM payments WHERE internal_ref = ),
          [constants.ORDER_STATUS.FRESHLY_KNEADED, externalId]
        );
      }
      return { received: true };
    });
    res.status(200).json({ received: true });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('MTN webhook error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Webhook processing failed' });
  }
};

const initiateAirtel = async (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Airtel initiate stub' });
};

const airtelStatus = async (req, res) => {
  res.json({ status: 'pending' });
};

const airtelWebhook = async (req, res) => {
  res.status(200).json({ received: true });
};

const uploadBankProof = async (req, res) => {
  const { order_id, proof } = req.body; // proof is base64 or URL
  // Store proof URL in payments (after uploading to Cloudinary)
  const paymentRes = await pool.query(
    INSERT INTO payments (order_id, payment_method, internal_ref, amount, bank_proof_url, status)
     SELECT , , , total, ,  FROM orders WHERE id =  RETURNING id,
    [order_id, constants.PAYMENT_METHOD.BANK_TRANSFER, ank__, proof, constants.PAYMENT_STATUS.PENDING]
  );
  res.json({ payment_id: paymentRes.rows[0].id, status: 'pending' });
};

const confirmBankPayment = async (req, res) => {
  // admin only, but we'll check role inside
  if (!req.admin) return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Admin required' });
  const { payment_id } = req.body;
  await pool.query(
    UPDATE payments SET status =  WHERE id = ,
    [constants.PAYMENT_STATUS.SUCCESSFUL, payment_id]
  );
  await pool.query(
    UPDATE orders SET payment_status = 'paid', status =  WHERE id = (SELECT order_id FROM payments WHERE id = ),
    [constants.ORDER_STATUS.FRESHLY_KNEADED, payment_id]
  );
  res.json({ message: 'Payment confirmed' });
};

module.exports = { initiateMtn, mtnStatus, mtnWebhook, initiateAirtel, airtelStatus, airtelWebhook, uploadBankProof, confirmBankPayment };

const { getAllProducts, getProductBySlug } = require('../db/queries/products.sql');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const getAll = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { category, limit = 12, page = 1 } = req.query;
    const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
    const products = await getAllProducts({ category, limit, offset });
    res.json({ products, page: parseInt(page), limit: parseInt(limit) });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Get products error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

const getFeatured = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const products = await getAllProducts({ featured: true, limit: 3 });
    res.json(products);
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Get featured error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

const getBySlug = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { slug } = req.params;
    const product = await getProductBySlug(slug);
    if (!product) return res.status(404).json({ error: 'Product not found' });
    res.json(product);
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Get product by slug error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
  }
};

module.exports = { getAll, getFeatured, getBySlug };

FILE: backend\src\controllers\admin\admin.auth.controller.js

const { pool } = require('../../config/db');
const bcrypt = require('bcrypt');
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const logger = require('../../config/logger');

const login = async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { email, password } = req.body;
    const result = await pool.query('SELECT id, email, password_hash, role FROM admin_users WHERE email =  AND is_active = true', [email]);
    if (!result.rows.length) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });
    const admin = result.rows[0];
    const valid = await bcrypt.compare(password, admin.password_hash);
    if (!valid) return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid credentials' });
    const token = jwt.sign({ id: admin.id, email: admin.email, role: admin.role }, process.env.ADMIN_JWT_SECRET, { expiresIn: '8h' });
    res.json({ accessToken: token, admin: { id: admin.id, email: admin.email, role: admin.role } });
  } catch (err) {
    logger.error('Admin login error', err);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal error' });
  }
};

const logout = (req, res) => {
  res.json({ message: 'Logged out' });
};

module.exports = { login, logout };

FILE: backend\src\db\migrations\001_initial_schema.sql
================================================================================
-- 001_initial_schema.sql
-- HAIQ Bakery – PostgreSQL Schema

-- Enable UUID extension
CREATE EXTENSION IF NOT EXISTS "uuid-ossp";

-- Users table (customers)
CREATE TABLE users (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email         VARCHAR(320) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  phone         VARCHAR(20),
  first_name    VARCHAR(100),
  last_name     VARCHAR(100),
  password_hash VARCHAR(255),            -- NULL for guest accounts
  is_guest      BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  guest_token   VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE,      -- link-to-account token
  email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Admin users
CREATE TABLE admin_users (
  id            UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email         VARCHAR(320) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  full_name     VARCHAR(200),
  role          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'staff', -- 'superadmin' | 'staff'
  is_active     BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  last_login    TIMESTAMPTZ,
  created_at    TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Categories
CREATE TABLE categories (
  id          SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  name        VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  slug        VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  sort_order  INT DEFAULT 0
);

-- Products
CREATE TABLE products (
  id             UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  slug           VARCHAR(200) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  name           VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  subtitle       VARCHAR(200),            -- e.g., "(Chocolate Chip)"
  description    TEXT,
  tasting_notes  TEXT,
  category_id    INT REFERENCES categories(id),
  base_price     NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,  -- UGX
  is_active      BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  is_featured    BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  is_limited     BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  sort_order     INT DEFAULT 0,
  created_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at     TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Product variants (size/price options)
CREATE TABLE product_variants (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id  UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  label       VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,      -- e.g., "6-Pack", "12-Pack"
  price       NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,     -- UGX
  stock_qty   INT DEFAULT 0,
  sku         VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE
);

-- Product images
CREATE TABLE product_images (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id  UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  url         TEXT NOT NULL,              -- Cloudinary URL
  alt_text    VARCHAR(300),
  sort_order  INT DEFAULT 0
);

-- Product items ("What's in the box")
CREATE TABLE product_items (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  product_id  UUID REFERENCES products(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  label       VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  sort_order  INT DEFAULT 0
);

-- Orders
CREATE TABLE orders (
  id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_number    VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL,  -- HAIQ-YYYYMMDD-XXXX
  tracking_token  VARCHAR(64) UNIQUE NOT NULL,  -- public tracking token
  user_id         UUID REFERENCES users(id),    -- NULL for pure guest
  guest_email     VARCHAR(320),
  guest_phone     VARCHAR(20),
  first_name      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  last_name       VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  email           VARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  phone           VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
  delivery_address TEXT NOT NULL,
  delivery_note   TEXT,
  gift_note       TEXT,
  subtotal        NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,
  delivery_fee    NUMERIC(12,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total           NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,
  status          VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'pending',  -- pending, freshly_kneaded, ovenbound, on_the_cart, en_route, delivered, cancelled
  payment_method  VARCHAR(50),   -- 'mtn_momo' | 'airtel' | 'bank_transfer'
  payment_status  VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'unpaid', -- unpaid, pending, paid, failed, refunded
  created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at      TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Order items
CREATE TABLE order_items (
  id              UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id        UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  product_id      UUID REFERENCES products(id),
  variant_id      UUID REFERENCES product_variants(id),
  product_name    VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,  -- snapshot at order time
  variant_label   VARCHAR(100),
  unit_price      NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,
  quantity        INT NOT NULL,
  line_total      NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL
);

-- Payments
CREATE TABLE payments (
  id                UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id          UUID REFERENCES orders(id),
  payment_method    VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  provider_ref      VARCHAR(255),    -- MTN/Airtel transaction ID
  internal_ref      VARCHAR(100) UNIQUE NOT NULL,  -- our idempotency key
  amount            NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL,
  currency          VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'UGX',
  status            VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'initiated', -- initiated, pending, successful, failed, cancelled
  webhook_payload   JSONB,           -- raw provider callback
  signature_valid   BOOLEAN,
  payer_phone       VARCHAR(20),
  bank_proof_url    TEXT,            -- for bank transfers
  notes             TEXT,
  created_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at        TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Order events (audit log)
CREATE TABLE order_events (
  id           UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id     UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  event_type   VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,  -- 'status_change' | 'payment_received' | 'note_added' | etc.
  old_value    VARCHAR(200),
  new_value    VARCHAR(200),
  actor_type   VARCHAR(50),            -- 'customer' | 'admin' | 'system' | 'webhook'
  actor_id     UUID,
  note         TEXT,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Customer‑admin messages
CREATE TABLE messages (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  order_id    UUID REFERENCES orders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  sender_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,   -- 'customer' | 'admin'
  sender_id   UUID,
  body        TEXT NOT NULL,
  is_read     BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Newsletter subscribers
CREATE TABLE newsletter_subscribers (
  id          UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email       VARCHAR(320) UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  subscribed  BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Request logs (optional)
CREATE TABLE request_logs (
  id           BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  method       VARCHAR(10),
  path         VARCHAR(500),
  status_code  INT,
  duration_ms  INT,
  ip           VARCHAR(50),
  user_agent   VARCHAR(500),
  user_id      UUID,
  created_at   TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Idempotency keys for payment webhooks
CREATE TABLE idempotency_keys (
  key         VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  response    JSONB,
  created_at  TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX idx_orders_created ON orders(created_at DESC);

CREATE INDEX idx_payments_internal_ref ON payments(internal_ref);
CREATE INDEX idx_payments_provider_ref ON payments(provider_ref);
CREATE INDEX idx_order_events_order ON order_events(order_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_messages_order ON messages(order_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_logs_created ON request_logs(created_at DESC);

FILE: backend\src\db\queries\products.sql.js
================================================================================
// products.sql.js – query functions for products
const { pool } = require('../config/db');

const getAllProducts = async (filters = {}) => {
  const { category, limit = 12, offset = 0 } = filters;
  let query = 
    SELECT p.*, json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('id', v.id, 'label', v.label, 'price', v.price)) as variants,
           json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('url', i.url, 'alt_text', i.alt_text, 'sort_order', i.sort_order)) as images
    FROM products p
    LEFT JOIN product_variants v ON p.id = v.product_id
    LEFT JOIN product_images i ON p.id = i.product_id
    WHERE p.is_active = true
  ;
  const params = [];
  if (category) {
    params.push(category);
    query +=  AND p.category_id = cls{params.length};
  }
  query +=  GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC LIMIT cls{params.length+1} OFFSET cls{params.length+2};
  params.push(limit, offset);
  const result = await pool.query(query, params);
  return result.rows;
};

const getProductBySlug = async (slug) => {
  const query = 
    SELECT p.*,
           json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('id', v.id, 'label', v.label, 'price', v.price, 'sku', v.sku)) as variants,
           json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('url', i.url, 'alt_text', i.alt_text, 'sort_order', i.sort_order) ORDER BY i.sort_order) as images,
           json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('label', it.label, 'sort_order', it.sort_order) ORDER BY it.sort_order) as items
    FROM products p
    LEFT JOIN product_variants v ON p.id = v.product_id
    LEFT JOIN product_images i ON p.id = i.product_id
    LEFT JOIN product_items it ON p.id = it.product_id
    WHERE p.slug =  AND p.is_active = true
    GROUP BY p.id
  ;
  const result = await pool.query(query, [slug]);
  return result.rows[0];
};

module.exports = { getAllProducts, getProductBySlug };



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\middleware\adminAuth.js
================================================================================
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const adminAuth = (requiredRole = 'staff') => {
  return async (req, res, next) => {
    const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
    if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'No token provided' });
    }
    const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
    try {
      const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.ADMIN_JWT_SECRET);
      // Check admin user in DB
      const admin = await pool.query(
        'SELECT id, email, role, is_active FROM admin_users WHERE id =  AND is_active = true',
        [decoded.id]
      );
      if (!admin.rows.length) {
        return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Admin not found or inactive' });
      }
      const adminUser = admin.rows[0];
      // Role check
      if (requiredRole === 'superadmin' && adminUser.role !== 'superadmin') {
        return res.status(403).json({ error: 'Insufficient permissions' });
      }
      req.admin = adminUser;
      next();
    } catch (err) {
      logger.warn('Admin JWT verification failed', err);
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid or expired token' });
    }
  };
};

module.exports = { adminAuth };



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\middleware\auth.js
================================================================================
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');
const { pool } = require('../config/db');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const authenticate = async (req, res, next) => {
  const authHeader = req.headers.authorization;
  if (!authHeader || !authHeader.startsWith('Bearer ')) {
    return res.status(401).json({ error: 'No token provided' });
  }
  const token = authHeader.split(' ')[1];
  try {
    const decoded = jwt.verify(token, process.env.JWT_SECRET);
    // Check if user still exists (optional)
    const user = await pool.query('SELECT id, email, is_guest FROM users WHERE id = ', [decoded.id]);
    if (!user.rows.length) {
      return res.status(401).json({ error: 'User not found' });
    }
    req.user = user.rows[0];
    next();
  } catch (err) {
    logger.warn('JWT verification failed', err);
    return res.status(401).json({ error: 'Invalid or expired token' });
  }
};

module.exports = { authenticate };



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\middleware\errorHandler.js
================================================================================
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const errorHandler = (err, req, res, next) => {
  logger.error('Unhandled error', { error: err.message, stack: err.stack });
  res.status(500).json({ error: 'Internal server error' });
};

module.exports = errorHandler;



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\middleware\rateLimiter.js
================================================================================
const rateLimit = require('express-rate-limit');

const global = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 60 * 1000, // 1 minute
  max: 100, // limit each IP to 100 requests per minute
  standardHeaders: true,
  legacyHeaders: false,
  message: { error: 'Too many requests, please try again later.' }
});

const auth = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes
  max: 10,
  skipSuccessfulRequests: true,
  message: { error: 'Too many login attempts, try again later.' }
});

const orderCreation = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 10 * 60 * 1000, // 10 minutes
  max: 5,
  message: { error: 'Too many orders created from this IP, please slow down.' }
});

const paymentInit = rateLimit({
  windowMs: 5 * 60 * 1000, // 5 minutes
  max: 3,
  message: { error: 'Too many payment attempts, try again later.' }
});

module.exports = { global, auth, orderCreation, paymentInit };



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\middleware\requestLogger.js
================================================================================
const logger = require('../config/logger');
const { pool } = require('../config/db');

const requestLogger = async (req, res, next) => {
  const start = Date.now();
  res.on('finish', async () => {
    const duration = Date.now() - start;
    const logEntry = {
      method: req.method,
      path: req.originalUrl,
      status_code: res.statusCode,
      duration_ms: duration,
      ip: req.ip || req.connection.remoteAddress,
      user_agent: req.get('User-Agent'),
      user_id: req.user?.id || req.admin?.id || null
    };
    logger.info('HTTP Request', logEntry);
    if (process.env.LOG_TO_DB === 'true') {
      try {
        await pool.query(
          INSERT INTO request_logs (method, path, status_code, duration_ms, ip, user_agent, user_id)
           VALUES (, , , , , , ),
          [logEntry.method, logEntry.path, logEntry.status_code, logEntry.duration_ms, logEntry.ip, logEntry.user_agent, logEntry.user_id]
        );
      } catch (err) {
        logger.error('Failed to log to DB', err);
      }
    }
  });
  next();
};

module.exports = requestLogger;



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\middleware\validate.js
================================================================================
const { z } = require('zod');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

const validate = (schema) => {
  return (req, res, next) => {
    try {
      schema.parse(req.body);
      next();
    } catch (err) {
      if (err instanceof z.ZodError) {
        logger.warn('Validation error', err.errors);
        return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Validation failed', details: err.errors });
      }
      next(err);
    }
  };
};

module.exports = validate;

FILE: backend\src\routes\auth.routes.js

const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const { z } = require('zod');
const validate = require('../middleware/validate');
const rateLimiter = require('../middleware/rateLimiter');
const authController = require('../controllers/auth.controller');

const registerSchema = z.object({
  email: z.string().email(),
  password: z.string().min(8),
  first_name: z.string().optional(),
  last_name: z.string().optional(),
  phone: z.string().optional()
});

const loginSchema = z.object({
  email: z.string().email(),
  password: z.string()
});

router.post('/register', rateLimiter.auth, validate(registerSchema), authController.register);
router.post('/login', rateLimiter.auth, validate(loginSchema), authController.login);
router.post('/logout', authController.logout);
router.post('/refresh', authController.refresh);
router.post('/forgot-password', rateLimiter.auth, authController.forgotPassword);
router.post('/reset-password', authController.resetPassword);
router.post('/verify-email', authController.verifyEmail);
router.post('/guest-link', authController.linkGuestOrder);

module.exports = router;

FILE: backend\src\routes\orders.routes.js
================================================================================
const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const { z } = require('zod');
const validate = require('../middleware/validate');
const { authenticate } = require('../middleware/auth');
const rateLimiter = require('../middleware/rateLimiter');
const ordersController = require('../controllers/orders.controller');

const orderItemSchema = z.object({
  product_id: z.string().uuid(),
  variant_id: z.string().uuid(),
  quantity: z.number().int().positive()
});

const orderSchema = z.object({
  first_name: z.string().min(1),
  last_name: z.string().min(1),
  email: z.string().email(),
  phone: z.string().min(1),
  delivery_address: z.string().min(1),
  delivery_note: z.string().optional(),
  gift_note: z.string().optional(),
  items: z.array(orderItemSchema).min(1),
  payment_method: z.enum(['mtn_momo', 'airtel', 'bank_transfer'])
});

router.post('/', rateLimiter.orderCreation, validate(orderSchema), ordersController.create);
router.get('/track/:token', ordersController.track);
router.get('/', authenticate, ordersController.getUserOrders);
router.get('/:id', authenticate, ordersController.getById);

module.exports = router;

const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const { z } = require('zod');
const validate = require('../middleware/validate');
const rateLimiter = require('../middleware/rateLimiter');
const paymentsController = require('../controllers/payments.controller');

const mtnInitSchema = z.object({
  order_id: z.string().uuid(),
  phone: z.string().min(1)
});

const airtelInitSchema = z.object({
  order_id: z.string().uuid(),
  phone: z.string().min(1)
});

const bankUploadSchema = z.object({
  order_id: z.string().uuid(),
  proof: z.string().min(1) // base64 or URL
});

router.post('/mtn/initiate', rateLimiter.paymentInit, validate(mtnInitSchema), paymentsController.initiateMtn);
router.get('/mtn/status/:ref', paymentsController.mtnStatus);
router.post('/mtn/webhook', paymentsController.mtnWebhook);

router.post('/airtel/initiate', rateLimiter.paymentInit, validate(airtelInitSchema), paymentsController.initiateAirtel);
router.get('/airtel/status/:ref', paymentsController.airtelStatus);
router.post('/airtel/webhook', paymentsController.airtelWebhook);

router.post('/bank/upload-proof', validate(bankUploadSchema), paymentsController.uploadBankProof);
router.post('/bank/confirm', paymentsController.confirmBankPayment); // admin only, but route defined here; admin check in controller

module.exports = router;

FILE: backend\src\routes\admin\admin.products.routes.js

const express = require('express');
const router = express.Router();
const { adminAuth } = require('../../middleware/adminAuth');
const adminProductsController = require('../../controllers/admin/admin.products.controller');

router.get('/', adminAuth(), adminProductsController.list);
router.post('/', adminAuth('superadmin'), adminProductsController.create);
router.put('/:id', adminAuth('superadmin'), adminProductsController.update);
router.delete('/:id', adminAuth('superadmin'), adminProductsController.delete);

module.exports = router;

FILE: backend\src\services\email.service.js
================================================================================
const nodemailer = require('nodemailer');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

let transporter;

const initTransporter = () => {
  if (process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production') {
    // Use Resend or SMTP
    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({
      host: 'smtp.resend.com',
      port: 465,
      secure: true,
      auth: {
        user: 'resend',
        pass: process.env.RESEND_API_KEY,
      },
    });
  } else {
    // Use ethereal for development
    nodemailer.createTestAccount().then(account => {
      transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({
        host: account.smtp.host,
        port: account.smtp.port,
        secure: account.smtp.secure,
        auth: {
          user: account.user,
          pass: account.pass,
        },
      });
    });
  }
};

const sendEmail = async ({ to, subject, html, text }) => {
  if (!transporter) await initTransporter();
  try {
    const info = await transporter.sendMail({
      from: process.env.EMAIL_FROM || 'orders@haiq.ug',
      to,
      subject,
      text,
      html,
    });
    logger.info(Email sent: );
    if (process.env.NODE_ENV !== 'production') {
      logger.info(Preview URL: );
    }
    return info;
  } catch (error) {
    logger.error('Email send error', error);
    throw error;
  }
};

const sendOrderConfirmation = async (order, customerEmail) => {
  const subject = HAIQ Order Confirmation #;
  const html = <p>Thank you for your order!</p><p>Order #</p><p>Total: UGX </p><p>We'll notify you when it's on the way.</p>;
  return sendEmail({ to: customerEmail, subject, html });
};

module.exports = { sendEmail, sendOrderConfirmation };

FILE: backend\src\services\mtn.service.js
================================================================================
const axios = require('axios');
const logger = require('../config/logger');

class MtnService {
  constructor() {
    this.baseURL = process.env.MTN_MOMO_BASE_URL;
    this.subscriptionKey = process.env.MTN_MOMO_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY;
    this.apiUser = process.env.MTN_MOMO_API_USER;
    this.apiKey = process.env.MTN_MOMO_API_KEY;
    this.environment = process.env.MTN_MOMO_ENVIRONMENT || 'sandbox';
  }

  async getAccessToken() {
    // In production, implement token caching and refresh
    const auth = Buffer.from(${this.apiUser}:).toString('base64');
    const response = await axios.post(${this.baseURL}/collection/token/, null, {
      headers: {
        'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key': this.subscriptionKey,
        Authorization: Basic ,
      },
    });
    return response.data.access_token;
  }

  async requestToPay({ amount, phone, externalId }) {
    const token = await this.getAccessToken();
    const response = await axios.post(
      ${this.baseURL}/collection/v1_0/requesttopay,
      {
        amount,
        currency: 'UGX',
        externalId,
        payer: { partyIdType: 'MSISDN', partyId: phone },
        payerMessage: 'HAIQ Payment',
        payeeNote: 'Thank you for your order',
      },
      {
        headers: {
          Authorization: Bearer ,
          'X-Reference-Id': externalId,
          'X-Target-Environment': this.environment,
          'Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key': this.subscriptionKey,
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
      }
    );
    return response.data;
  }
}

module.exports = new MtnService();

FILE: backend\src\utils\crypto.js
================================================================================
const crypto = require('crypto');

const generateToken = (length = 32) => {
  return crypto.randomBytes(length).toString('hex');
};

const hashPassword = (password) => {
  const salt = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('hex');
  const hash = crypto.pbkdf2Sync(password, salt, 1000, 64, 'sha512').toString('hex');
  return { salt, hash };
};

const verifyPassword = (password, salt, storedHash) => {
  const hash = crypto.pbkdf2Sync(password, salt, 1000, 64, 'sha512').toString('hex');
  return hash === storedHash;
};

// HMAC signature for webhooks
const signPayload = (payload, secret) => {
  return crypto.createHmac('sha256', secret).update(JSON.stringify(payload)).digest('hex');
};

const verifySignature = (payload, signature, secret) => {
  const expected = signPayload(payload, secret);
  return crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(expected), Buffer.from(signature));
};

module.exports = { generateToken, hashPassword, verifyPassword, signPayload, verifySignature };



================================================================================
FILE: backend\src\utils\idempotency.js
================================================================================
const { pool } = require('../config/db');

const withIdempotency = async (key, handler) => {
  const client = await pool.connect();
  try {
    await client.query('BEGIN');
    // Check if key exists
    const existing = await client.query('SELECT response FROM idempotency_keys WHERE key = ', [key]);
    if (existing.rows.length > 0) {
      await client.query('COMMIT');
      return JSON.parse(existing.rows[0].response);
    }
    // Execute handler (which should return a serializable result)
    const result = await handler();
    // Store result
    await client.query('INSERT INTO idempotency_keys (key, response) VALUES (, )', [key, JSON.stringify(result)]);
    await client.query('COMMIT');
    return result;
  } catch (err) {
    await client.query('ROLLBACK');
    throw err;
  } finally {
    client.release();
  }
};

module.exports = { withIdempotency };

const crypto = require('crypto');

const generateOrderNumber = () => {
  const date = new Date();
  const yyyymmdd = date.toISOString().slice(0,10).replace(/-/g,'');
  const random = crypto.randomBytes(2).toString('hex').toUpperCase();
  return HAIQ--;
};

const generateTrackingToken = () => {
  return crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');
};

const generateGuestToken = () => {
  return crypto.randomBytes(32).toString('hex');
};

module.exports = { generateOrderNumber, generateTrackingToken, generateGuestToken };

FILE: backend\__tests__\crypto.test.js
================================================================================
const { verifySignature } = require('../src/utils/crypto');

describe('Crypto utils', () => {
  test('verifySignature should return true for valid signature', () => {
    const payload = { test: 'data' };
    const secret = 'secret';
    const signature = require('crypto').createHmac('sha256', secret).update(JSON.stringify(payload)).digest('hex');
    expect(verifySignature(payload, signature, secret)).toBe(true);
  });

  test('verifySignature should return false for invalid signature', () => {
    const payload = { test: 'data' };
    const secret = 'secret';
    const signature = 'wrong';
    expect(verifySignature(payload, signature, secret)).toBe(false);
  });
});

================================================================================
FILE: frontend\src\App.jsx
================================================================================
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route } from 'react-router-dom'
import { CartProvider } from './context/CartContext'
import { AuthProvider } from './context/AuthContext'
import Layout from './components/layout/Layout'

// Pages
import HomePage from './pages/HomePage'
import ShopPage from './pages/ShopPage'
import ProductDetailPage from './pages/ProductDetailPage'
import BuildYourBoxPage from './pages/BuildYourBoxPage'
import CheckoutPage from './pages/CheckoutPage'
import OrderConfirmationPage from './pages/OrderConfirmationPage'
import TrackOrderPage from './pages/TrackOrderPage'
import AccountPage from './pages/AccountPage'
import AccountOrdersPage from './pages/AccountOrdersPage'
import ContactPage from './pages/ContactPage'
import FAQPage from './pages/FAQPage'

function App() {
  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <AuthProvider>
        <CartProvider>
          <Layout>
            <Routes>
              <Route path="/" element={<HomePage />} />
              <Route path="/shop" element={<ShopPage />} />
              <Route path="/shop/:category" element={<ShopPage />} />
              <Route path="/products/:slug" element={<ProductDetailPage />} />
              <Route path="/build-your-own" element={<BuildYourBoxPage />} />
              <Route path="/checkout" element={<CheckoutPage />} />
              <Route path="/order-confirmation/:id" element={<OrderConfirmationPage />} />
              <Route path="/track/:token" element={<TrackOrderPage />} />
              <Route path="/account" element={<AccountPage />} />
              <Route path="/account/orders" element={<AccountOrdersPage />} />
              <Route path="/contact" element={<ContactPage />} />
              <Route path="/faq" element={<FAQPage />} />
            </Routes>
          </Layout>
        </CartProvider>
      </AuthProvider>
    </BrowserRouter>
  )
}

export default App

================================================================================
FILE: frontend\src\components\cart\CartDrawer.jsx
================================================================================
import { useCart } from '../../context/CartContext'
import CartLineItem from './CartLineItem'
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'

export default function CartDrawer() {
  const { isOpen, closeDrawer, items, subtotal } = useCart()

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/50" onClick={closeDrawer}>
      <div className="absolute right-0 top-0 h-full w-full max-w-md bg-light text-dark shadow-xl" onClick={e => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center p-4 border-b">
          <h2 className="text-xl font-bold">Your Cart</h2>
          <button onClick={closeDrawer} className="text-2xl">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 overflow-y-auto" style={{ maxHeight: 'calc(100vh - 200px)' }}>
          {items.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-center text-gray-500">Your cart is empty</p>
          ) : (
            items.map(item => <CartLineItem key={item.variantId} item={item} />)
          )}
        </div>
        {items.length > 0 && (
          <div className="absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 border-t bg-light">
            <div className="flex justify-between mb-4">
              <span className="font-bold">Subtotal</span>
              <span>UGX {subtotal.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </div>
            <Link to="/checkout" onClick={closeDrawer}>
              <button className="w-full bg-primary text-dark py-3 rounded font-bold hover:bg-primary/80">
                Checkout
              </button>
            </Link>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}


================================================================================
FILE: frontend\src\components\cart\CartLineItem.jsx
================================================================================
import { useCart } from '../../context/CartContext'

export default function CartLineItem({ item }) {
  const { updateQuantity, removeItem } = useCart()

  return (
    <div className="flex py-4 border-b">
      <img src={item.image} alt={item.name} className="w-16 h-16 object-cover rounded" />
      <div className="ml-4 flex-1">
        <h4 className="font-bold">{item.name}</h4>
        <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">{item.variantLabel}</p>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
          <div className="flex items-center border rounded">
            <button onClick={() => updateQuantity(item.variantId, item.quantity - 1)} className="px-2 py-1">-</button>
            <span className="px-3">{item.quantity}</span>
            <button onClick={() => updateQuantity(item.variantId, item.quantity + 1)} className="px-2 py-1">+</button>
          </div>
          <span>UGX {(item.price * item.quantity).toLocaleString()}</span>
        </div>
        <button onClick={() => removeItem(item.variantId)} className="text-sm text-red-500 mt-1">Remove</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

================================================================================
FILE: frontend\src\components\home\CoreCollectionCarousel.jsx
================================================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
import ProductCard from '../product/ProductCard'
import ProductCardSkeleton from '../product/ProductCardSkeleton'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function CoreCollectionCarousel() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const scrollRef = useRef()

  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products?limit=12)
      .then(res => setProducts(res.data.products))
      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
  }, [])

  const scroll = (dir) => {
    if (scrollRef.current) {
      const { scrollLeft, clientWidth } = scrollRef.current
      const to = dir === 'left' ? scrollLeft - clientWidth * 0.8 : scrollLeft + clientWidth * 0.8
      scrollRef.current.scrollTo({ left: to, behavior: 'smooth' })
    }
  }

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-light">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-8">Core Collection</h2>
        <div className="relative">
          <button onClick={() => scroll('left')} className="absolute left-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10 bg-dark/50 text-light p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-dark/70">←</button>
          <div ref={scrollRef} className="overflow-x-auto scrollbar-hide flex space-x-6 pb-4" style={{ scrollbarWidth: 'none' }}>
            {loading
              ? Array(6).fill().map((_, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="flex-none w-64">
                    <ProductCardSkeleton />
                  </div>
                ))
              : products.map(p => (
                  <div key={p.id} className="flex-none w-64">
                    <ProductCard product={p} />
                  </div>
                ))
            }
          </div>
          <button onClick={() => scroll('right')} className="absolute right-0 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 z-10 bg-dark/50 text-light p-2 rounded-full hover:bg-dark/70">→</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  )
}

FILE: frontend\src\components\home\FeaturedCollections.jsx
================================================================================
import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import ProductCard from '../product/ProductCard'
import ProductCardSkeleton from '../product/ProductCardSkeleton'
import axios from 'axios'

export default function FeaturedCollections() {
  const [products, setProducts] = useState([])
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)

  useEffect(() => {
    axios.get(${import.meta.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL}/products/featured)
      .then(res => setProducts(res.data))
      .finally(() => setLoading(false))
  }, [])

  return (
    <section className="py-16 bg-light">
      <div className="container mx-auto px-4">
        <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-center mb-12">Featured Collections</h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-8">
          {loading
            ? Array(3).fill().map((_, i) => <ProductCardSkeleton key={i} />)
            : products.map(p => <ProductCard key={p.id} product={p} />)
          }
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>
  )
}

FILE: frontend\src\components\layout\MobileMenu.jsx
================================================================================
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useEffect } from 'react'

export default function MobileMenu({ isOpen, onClose }) {
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isOpen) {
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'
    } else {
      document.body.style.overflow = 'unset'
    }
    return () => { document.body.style.overflow = 'unset' }
  }, [isOpen])

  if (!isOpen) return null

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-dark/95 text-light flex flex-col">
      <div className="flex justify-end p-4">
        <button onClick={onClose} className="text-2xl">&times;</button>
      </div>
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center flex-1 space-y-6 text-xl">
        <Link to="/shop" onClick={onClose}>Shop</Link>
        <Link to="/build-your-own" onClick={onClose}>Build Your Box</Link>
        <Link to="/contact" onClick={onClose}>Contact</Link>
        <Link to="/account" onClick={onClose}>Account</Link>
        <Link to="/faq" onClick={onClose}>FAQ</Link>
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}

export default function Navbar() {

  const { totalItems } = useCart()

  return (
    <>

        <div className="container mx-auto px-4 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
